SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2017 BY JUDGE PR TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFFS KE WANG AND YAN ZHANG ARE PRESENT. LC BUSINESS SYSTEM CORP IS PRESENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, KE ZHANG, YAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LC BUSINESS SYSTEMS CORP LUO, YONG Z. $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $120.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL DELIVER TO PLAINITFFS WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THIS ORDER A NEW CASIO QT 6600 IN A MANUFACTURED SEALED UNOPENDED BOX.
